title: Les secrets de la princesse de Cadignan
original_title: Les secrets de la princesse de Cadignan
overview: "Don Juan woman", according to the expression of Balzac. A princess, a great seductress. Of a diabolical intelligence. This woman, who has had many lovers— almost all the male characters of the "Comédie Humaine“— will finally find love. The real one. The great one.
